name: Tangle
short: AI-native ERP for SMB manufacturers — workflows, screens, reports, and production automations teams reshape around their actual process.
full: Tangle is an AI-native ERP for small and mid-sized manufacturers that lets teams reshape workflows, screens, reports, and automations around their actual production process. Its core value is flexible manufacturing operations rather than a generic ERP template — auditability, controlled workflow changes, traceable operations, custom dashboards, and ISO-style quality management expectations.

name: Rillet
short: AI-native finance ERP automating month-end close, revenue recognition, SaaS metrics, and audit-ready accounting workflows.
full: Rillet is an AI-native finance ERP for scaling companies that automates month-end close, revenue recognition, SaaS metrics, financial reporting, and controls directly from the general ledger. Built for projects where accounting workflows, permissions, audit trails, and ERP integrations matter — SOC 1 Type II for financial reporting controls and SOC 2 Type II for security, availability, and confidentiality.

name: Keragon
short: HIPAA-compliant healthcare automation connecting EHR, CRM, forms, billing, and PHI-related workflows.
full: Keragon is a HIPAA-compliant healthcare automation platform built for clinics, digital health startups, and care teams that need secure workflow automation across EHRs, CRMs, forms, billing, messaging, and internal tools. Compliance story: HIPAA, PHI-safe automation, healthcare integrations, and BAA expectations.

name: Fulcrum
short: Cloud manufacturing software for shop-floor scheduling, live production data, operator workflows, and paperless operations.
full: Fulcrum is cloud manufacturing software that connects shop-floor activity, scheduling, production tracking, job costing, inventory movement, and operator workflows in one live system. Strong reference for custom ERP, MRP, and MES projects where real-time operational data matters more than static reporting.

name: Tellescope
short: HIPAA-compliant digital health CRM and care workflow platform for patient communication and virtual care operations.
full: Tellescope is a unified digital health platform and HIPAA-compliant CRM for modern healthcare teams — patient communication, virtual care delivery, workflow automation, care coordination, and custom patient pathways. A strong reference for multi-tenant healthcare SaaS combining CRM, care workflows, tasks, messaging, and integrations.

name: CoverGo
short: AI and no-code insurance platform for product configuration, policy administration, claims automation, and insurer operations.
full: CoverGo is an AI and no-code insurance platform for health, life, and P&C insurers — configurable products, policy administration, claims workflows, distribution portals, APIs, and operational automation. Public security positioning: ISO 27001 certification and SOC 2 Type I compliance.

name: AI Insurance
short: AI-powered insurance management for underwriting, submissions intake, claims parsing, billing, and program operations.
full: AI Insurance is an all-in-one insurance management platform for MGAs, RRGs, TPAs, captives, and program managers. Uses AI to automate underwriting, claims, submission processing, billing, bordereaux, document intake, permissions, and program operations. Compliance footer: HIPAA and SOC 2 Type 2.

name: Numeric
short: AI close automation platform unifying close management, reconciliation, reporting, and audit workflows.
full: Numeric is an AI close automation platform for accounting teams — close management, account reconciliation, reporting, cash visibility, review workflows, and finance controls. A clean reference for SaaS backend work involving approvals, audit readiness, ERP data sync, and accounting process automation.

name: Classe365
short: School management SaaS — admissions, SIS, academics, LMS, CRM, fees, and student lifecycle operations.
full: Classe365 is a school management SaaS covering admissions, SIS, academics, LMS, CRM, fees, student communication, parent engagement, and institutional operations. Compliance materials reference FERPA, GDPR, COPPA, and California privacy law.

name: OmniMD AI Front Desk
short: AI medical receptionist — calls, scheduling, intake, check-in, insurance verification, and EHR-adjacent workflows.
full: OmniMD AI Front Desk is an AI medical receptionist product connected to OmniMD's broader EHR, RCM, practice management, and digital health ecosystem. Maps to HIPAA-sensitive workflows, EHR-adjacent integrations, role-based access, audit logging, secure patient communication, and operational automation for clinics.

name: Katana
short: Cloud inventory and manufacturing SaaS — real-time stock, production tracking, sales orders, and multi-location operations.
full: Katana is a cloud inventory and manufacturing platform for product businesses — real-time stock visibility, production tracking, sales order management, purchasing, outsourced production coordination, accounting integrations, and multi-location operations. Strong multi-tenant manufacturing SaaS reference.

name: Sprout.ai
short: AI insurance claims automation — claims processing, coverage checking, fraud detection, and core system integrations.
full: Sprout.ai is an AI insurance claims automation platform built to speed up claims processing, policy coverage checking, fraud detection, and decision support across the claims lifecycle — insurance-trained AI, document processing, NLP, LLMs, and integrations with core insurance platforms.

name: OpenEduCat
short: Open-source education ERP — student records, enrollment, attendance, grades, fees, LMS, AI tools, RBAC, consent, and audit trails.
full: OpenEduCat is an open-source education ERP for schools, colleges, and universities — student records, admissions, enrollment, attendance, grading, fees, LMS, communication, and AI-supported academic workflows. References FERPA, GDPR compatibility, student consent workflows, immutable audit logs, RBAC, and optional on-premise deployment.

name: Basis
short: AI accounting agent platform for firms — CAS, tax, audit, advisory workflows, with review-ready human handoffs.
full: Basis is an AI accounting agent platform for accounting firms — runs CAS, tax, audit, and advisory workflows end-to-end before handing finished work to humans for review. SOC 2-style controls, audit trails, access management, encryption, data handling restrictions, and evidence quality for firm-level review.

name: Awell
short: Healthcare care-flow orchestration — design, launch, and improve automated clinical workflows via drag-and-drop or AI prompts.
full: Awell is a healthcare care-flow orchestration platform that lets clinical, product, and operations teams design, launch, operate, and improve automated care flows using drag-and-drop tools or natural language AI prompts. HIPAA-aware healthcare operations, patient safety governance, auditability, and controlled deployment of workflows and AI agents.
